entity.summary: Decentralized trading platform and DeFi liquidity aggregator offering non-custodial token execution across multiple networks. HEI treats bopAMM as a product and protocol surface under the parent Bebop entity rather than as a standalone exchange entity.
entity.notes: Parent-identity review resolved the bopAMM candidate row under Bebop. Launch date remains null because this review did not recover a sufficiently strong first-party launch marker.

evidence.title: Bebop project directory entry
evidence.notes: Project directory identifies Bebop as a decentralized trading platform, links its website and trade application, and associates the Bebop GitHub organization and deployed contracts.

evidence.title: Bebop official trading website
evidence.notes: First-party project domain used as the current service identity reference.
